architecture.summary: Bug fix in safeProjectRoot() stub + boundary guards in canonical.ts. findProjectRoot() already exists in project-root.ts with marker-based walk-up. Fix wires it into safeProjectRoot() with HOME guard and --cwd escape hatch.

integrations.summary: N/A - internal CLI bug fix, no external integrations

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI-only change, no UI involved

performance.summary: N/A - findProjectRoot walks up at most ~10 directories, negligible perf impact

security.summary: Path traversal guard in resolveAgentSkillsDir prevents localSkillsDir with ../ escaping project root. HOME guard in ensureCanonicalDir throws on exact homedir match for non-global installs.

edge-cases.summary: findProjectRoot null returns cwd (no HOME guard on null). --cwd bypasses HOME guard entirely. safeProjectRoot silently falls back; canonical.ts throws hard errors. HOME check is exact match only.
